title: الرحمة بالنفس
citation: Neff, K.D. (2003). The development and validation of a scale to measure self-compassion. Self and Identity, 2(3), 223-250.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~350 words). Cover: self-compassion — rahma (رحمة) as Islamic anchor; self-compassion as stewardship not selfishness; common humanity. Khaleeji register.
